title: Fashion and Sports: Balkan Olympic Teams' Outfits Introduced | Balkan Insight
author: BIRN
description: The official outfits of Balkan countries' Olympic teams have been put on show ahead of the 2024 Games in Paris, with some countries following glamorous designs while others have opted for humbler and more traditional outfits.
